name: California's Great America
description: California's Great America is a 112 acre amusement park located in Santa Clara, California, United States.  Owned and operated by Six Flags, it originally opened in 1976 as one of two Americana-themed parks built by the Marriott Corporation.  Great America features over 40 rides and attractions, with Gold Striker among its most notable, which has ranked as a top wooden roller coaster in the world in the annual Golden Ticket Awards publication from Amusement Today.
imageAttribution: The Carousel Columbia, the park's centerpiece attraction (pictured in 2015)
